ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the financial document:  Navneet Education Limited has received an advisory from the Assistant Commissioner of State Taxes regarding a verification of its GST compliance, specifically concerning the reversal of Input Tax Credit (ITC) attributable to exempt supplies for FY 2025-26 and 2026-27. The company is required to furnish reconciliation and ITC details and potentially reverse any ineligible ITC. However, the company asserts that there is no material financial or operational impact from this regulatory advisory.
